paths.node:fs: site-core is framework-agnostic and must not touch the filesystem. File I/O belongs in CLI or web-tool consumer code.
paths.node:fs/promises: site-core is framework-agnostic and must not touch the filesystem. File I/O belongs in CLI or web-tool consumer code.
paths.node:child_process: site-core is framework-agnostic and must not spawn processes. Subprocess work belongs in CLI consumer code.
paths.child_process: site-core is framework-agnostic and must not spawn processes. Subprocess work belongs in CLI consumer code.
paths.fs: site-core is framework-agnostic and must not touch the filesystem. File I/O belongs in CLI or web-tool consumer code.
paths.fs/promises: site-core is framework-agnostic and must not touch the filesystem. File I/O belongs in CLI or web-tool consumer code.
